<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band08_chunk005.pdf#page=8 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band08 p214 -->

<!-- header: OBERORNAL -->

<!-- header: OBERORNALI -->


[[File:Band08_chunk005_p008_img001.jpg|thumb|D Kreuzigung Christi, 3 Matthäus, 4 Bartholomäus, 7 Thomas, 8 Jakobus minor]]



[[File:Band08_chunk005_p008_img002.jpg|thumb]]



----
2 I
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band08 p215 -->
